name: Downtown Farmers' Market Festival

Products.value: Farm products from the Western Slope and around Colorado (Palisade Peaches featured), plus local maker goods and art vendors

notes: On-file record had no website/facebook. This id ('Downtown Farmers' Market Festival', Main St., 81501) appears to be an older/historical name (also seen as 'American National Bank Downtown Farmers Market Festival' on third-party aggregators) for the same downtown Main St. farmers market event now operated by Downtown Grand Junction (downtowngj.org) and branded 'Market on Main' (currently presented by Intermountain Health St. Mary's Regional Hospital). Note there is a separate, distinct catalog entry 'downtown-grand-junction-market-on-main__grand-junction' already pointing to the same downtowngj.org page - these two ids likely represent duplicate/renamed listings of one real-world market. Used downtowngj.org as the official source since it is the current operator's site for the Main St. downtown market. No phone, email, ADA accessibility, or certified-organic info found on official site; street address kept as-is (general 'Main St.' description matches site's '3rd to 7th St' range, no more precise address stated).
